text: It seems to emerge from what follows that two rebellious movements were here combined; a general civil revolt against the leadership of Moses, under Dathan and Abiron, and a revolt of the Levites, under Core, against the privileged position of Aaron’s family. The rebels of the former class were swallowed up by the earth, those of the latter perished by fire.
According to the Hebrew text, ‘they are holy things, the censers of these sinners’.
‘The fire’; according to the Hebrew text, ‘the plague’.
